destinations.evidence: Both factory creation paths copy the incoming EvmEnv block_env and cfg_env into the inner Ethereum context before wrapping it in AsyncEthEvmContext.

equivalence_argument: The factory mutates the inner context with the supplied block and config before constructing the async wrapper, preserving execution environment identity for the resulting EVM.
rationale: The factory now mutates inner_context.block and inner_context.cfg from the input EvmEnv in both create paths before constructing the EVM. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: RitualEvmFactory must copy the EvmEnv block_env and cfg_env into the inner Ethereum EVM context before wrapping it in AsyncEthEvmContext.
suggested_falsification_tests: Create an EVM with non-default block_env/cfg_env values and assert the resulting context uses those values during transaction execution.
summary: RitualEvmFactory preserves EvmEnv block and cfg values.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Create an EVM with distinctive EvmEnv block/cfg values and assert transaction execution sees those values.
title: EVM factory preserves EvmEnv block and cfg
